# Database validation is a process-boundary diagnostic for file-backed databases.
env MINA_FX_AUTO_LOAD_ENABLED=false
freeport
exec mina serve --demo --db $WORK/demo.db --schema demo --yes --host 127.0.0.1 --port $PORT --quiet &server&
httpget http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/api/health
stdout '"status":"ok"'
kill -INT server
wait server

duckdbsnapshot $WORK/demo.db $WORK/demo.snapshot

# Clean migrated demo state validates.
exec mina db validate --db $WORK/demo.db --schema demo
stdout 'ok: database is valid'
duckdbsnapshot $WORK/demo.db $WORK/demo.snapshot

# Validation never creates files or schemas.
! exec mina db validate --db $WORK/missing.db --schema demo
stderr 'missing.db'
! exists $WORK/missing.db

! exec mina db validate --db $WORK/demo.db --schema missing_schema
stderr 'accounting schema "missing_schema" does not exist in database .*demo.db'
duckdbtables $WORK/demo.db missing_schema
stdout '^0$'

# Schema version cases.
duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/version_behind_latest.db
duckdbexec $WORK/version_behind_latest.db version_behind_latest.sql
! exec mina db validate --db $WORK/version_behind_latest.db --schema demo
stderr 'error: schema: schema_version .* has pending migrations; run mina migrate first'
duckdbexec $WORK/version_behind_latest.db version_assert_behind_latest.sql

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/version_newer_than_binary.db
duckdbexec $WORK/version_newer_than_binary.db version_newer_than_binary.sql
! exec mina db validate --db $WORK/version_newer_than_binary.db --schema demo
stderr 'error: schema: database is newer than this binary'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/version_unsupported_shape.db
duckdbexec $WORK/version_unsupported_shape.db version_unsupported_shape.sql
! exec mina db validate --db $WORK/version_unsupported_shape.db --schema demo
stderr 'error: schema: schema_version table has unsupported shape; run mina migrate first'

# Schema layer cases.
duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/schema_drop_unique_index.db
duckdbexec $WORK/schema_drop_unique_index.db schema_drop_unique_index.sql
exec mina db validate --db $WORK/schema_drop_unique_index.db --schema demo
stdout 'warning: schema: missing unique index category_active_fqn_unique'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/schema_drop_unique_constraint.db
duckdbexec $WORK/schema_drop_unique_constraint.db schema_drop_unique_constraint.sql
exec mina db validate --db $WORK/schema_drop_unique_constraint.db --schema demo
stdout -count=1 'warning: schema: missing unique constraint \(name, tombstoned_at\) on table member'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/schema_drop_column.db
duckdbexec $WORK/schema_drop_column.db schema_drop_column.sql
! exec mina db validate --db $WORK/schema_drop_column.db --schema demo
stderr 'error: schema: missing column journal_record.memo'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/schema_retype_enum.db
duckdbexec $WORK/schema_retype_enum.db schema_retype_enum.sql
! exec mina db validate --db $WORK/schema_retype_enum.db --schema demo
stderr 'error: schema: column journal_record.posting_status type mismatch'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/schema_unknown_table.db
duckdbexec $WORK/schema_unknown_table.db schema_unknown_table.sql
exec mina db validate --db $WORK/schema_unknown_table.db --schema demo
stdout 'info: schema: unexpected table manual_audit_note'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/schema_info_ref_dangling_account.db
duckdbexec $WORK/schema_info_ref_dangling_account.db schema_info_ref_dangling_account.sql
! exec mina db validate --db $WORK/schema_info_ref_dangling_account.db --schema demo
stderr 'info: schema: unexpected table manual_audit_note'
stderr 'error: referential: active journal_record.account_id references missing account'

# Referential layer cases.
duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/ref_dangling_account.db
duckdbexec $WORK/ref_dangling_account.db ref_dangling_account.sql
! exec mina db validate --db $WORK/ref_dangling_account.db --schema demo
stderr 'error: referential: active journal_record.account_id references missing account'
exec mina db validate --shallow --db $WORK/ref_dangling_account.db --schema demo
stdout 'ok: database is valid'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/ref_tombstoned_transaction.db
duckdbexec $WORK/ref_tombstoned_transaction.db ref_tombstoned_transaction.sql
! exec mina db validate --db $WORK/ref_tombstoned_transaction.db --schema demo
stderr 'error: referential: active journal_record.transaction_id references tombstoned transaction'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/ref_tombstoned_category.db
duckdbexec $WORK/ref_tombstoned_category.db ref_tombstoned_category.sql
! exec mina db validate --db $WORK/ref_tombstoned_category.db --schema demo
stderr 'error: referential: active journal_record.category_id references tombstoned category'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/ref_dangling_imported_metadata.db
duckdbexec $WORK/ref_dangling_imported_metadata.db ref_dangling_imported_metadata.sql
! exec mina db validate --db $WORK/ref_dangling_imported_metadata.db --schema demo
stderr 'error: referential: active imported_record_metadata.record_id references missing journal_record'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/ref_tombstoned_imported_metadata_parent.db
duckdbexec $WORK/ref_tombstoned_imported_metadata_parent.db ref_tombstoned_imported_metadata_parent.sql
exec mina db validate --db $WORK/ref_tombstoned_imported_metadata_parent.db --schema demo
stdout 'ok: database is valid'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/ref_dangling_record_link.db
duckdbexec $WORK/ref_dangling_record_link.db ref_dangling_record_link.sql
! exec mina db validate --db $WORK/ref_dangling_record_link.db --schema demo
stderr 'error: referential: active record_link.origin_record_id references missing journal_record'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/ref_dangling_record_link_settlement.db
duckdbexec $WORK/ref_dangling_record_link_settlement.db ref_dangling_record_link_settlement.sql
! exec mina db validate --db $WORK/ref_dangling_record_link_settlement.db --schema demo
stderr 'error: referential: active record_link.settlement_record_id references missing journal_record'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/ref_tombstoned_record_link_parent.db
duckdbexec $WORK/ref_tombstoned_record_link_parent.db ref_tombstoned_record_link_parent.sql
! exec mina db validate --db $WORK/ref_tombstoned_record_link_parent.db --schema demo
stderr 'error: referential: active record_link.origin_record_id references tombstoned journal_record'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/ref_tombstoned_record_link_settlement_parent.db
duckdbexec $WORK/ref_tombstoned_record_link_settlement_parent.db ref_tombstoned_record_link_settlement_parent.sql
! exec mina db validate --db $WORK/ref_tombstoned_record_link_settlement_parent.db --schema demo
stderr 'error: referential: active record_link.settlement_record_id references tombstoned journal_record'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/ref_dangling_tag.db
duckdbexec $WORK/ref_dangling_tag.db ref_dangling_tag.sql
exec mina db validate --db $WORK/ref_dangling_tag.db --schema demo
stdout 'warning: referential: active journal_record.tag_ids references missing tag'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/ref_dangling_credit_limit_account.db
duckdbexec $WORK/ref_dangling_credit_limit_account.db ref_dangling_credit_limit_account.sql
exec mina db validate --db $WORK/ref_dangling_credit_limit_account.db --schema demo
stdout 'warning: referential: active credit_limit_history.account_id references missing account'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/ref_budget_active_and_tombstoned_category_fqn.db
duckdbexec $WORK/ref_budget_active_and_tombstoned_category_fqn.db ref_budget_active_and_tombstoned_category_fqn.sql
exec mina db validate --db $WORK/ref_budget_active_and_tombstoned_category_fqn.db --schema demo
stdout 'ok: database is valid'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/ref_budget_category_group_fqn.db
duckdbexec $WORK/ref_budget_category_group_fqn.db ref_budget_category_group_fqn.sql
exec mina db validate --db $WORK/ref_budget_category_group_fqn.db --schema demo
stdout 'ok: database is valid'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/ref_budget_missing_category_group_fqn.db
duckdbexec $WORK/ref_budget_missing_category_group_fqn.db ref_budget_missing_category_group_fqn.sql
exec mina db validate --db $WORK/ref_budget_missing_category_group_fqn.db --schema demo
stdout 'warning: referential: active budget.category_fqn references missing category'

# SQL invariant and value-domain cases.
duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/inv_unbalanced.db
duckdbexec $WORK/inv_unbalanced.db inv_unbalanced.sql
! exec mina db validate --db $WORK/inv_unbalanced.db --schema demo
stderr 'error: invariant: transaction .* is unbalanced for USD'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/inv_single_record.db
duckdbexec $WORK/inv_single_record.db inv_single_record.sql
! exec mina db validate --db $WORK/inv_single_record.db --schema demo
stderr 'error: invariant: active transaction .* has fewer than two active records'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/inv_mixed_cancelled_status.db
duckdbexec $WORK/inv_mixed_cancelled_status.db inv_mixed_cancelled_status.sql
! exec mina db validate --db $WORK/inv_mixed_cancelled_status.db --schema demo
stderr 'error: invariant: transaction .* mixes cancelled and non-cancelled active records'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/inv_mixed_expected_status.db
duckdbexec $WORK/inv_mixed_expected_status.db inv_mixed_expected_status.sql
! exec mina db validate --db $WORK/inv_mixed_expected_status.db --schema demo
stderr 'error: invariant: transaction .* mixes expected and non-expected active records'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/inv_expected_without_occurrence.db
duckdbexec $WORK/inv_expected_without_occurrence.db inv_expected_without_occurrence.sql
! exec mina db validate --db $WORK/inv_expected_without_occurrence.db --schema demo
stderr 'error: invariant: expected transaction .* has no recurring occurrence'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/inv_recurring_definition_shape.db
duckdbexec $WORK/inv_recurring_definition_shape.db inv_recurring_definition_shape.sql
! exec mina db validate --db $WORK/inv_recurring_definition_shape.db --schema demo
stderr 'error: invariant: recurring definition .* is unbalanced for USD'
stderr 'error: invariant: active recurring definition .* has fewer than two active records'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/inv_nonpositive_exchange_rate.db
duckdbexec $WORK/inv_nonpositive_exchange_rate.db inv_nonpositive_exchange_rate.sql
! exec mina db validate --db $WORK/inv_nonpositive_exchange_rate.db --schema demo
stderr 'error: invariant: exchange_rate.rate must be positive'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/inv_zero_amount.db
duckdbexec $WORK/inv_zero_amount.db inv_zero_amount.sql
exec mina db validate --db $WORK/inv_zero_amount.db --schema demo
stdout 'warning: invariant: journal_record.amount_usd is zero'
stdout 'warning: invariant: transaction_template_record.amount is zero'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/inv_invalid_currency.db
duckdbexec $WORK/inv_invalid_currency.db inv_invalid_currency.sql
exec mina db validate --db $WORK/inv_invalid_currency.db --schema demo
stdout 'warning: invariant: invalid currency code ZZZ'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/inv_malformed_fqn.db
duckdbexec $WORK/inv_malformed_fqn.db inv_malformed_fqn.sql
exec mina db validate --db $WORK/inv_malformed_fqn.db --schema demo
stdout 'warning: invariant: malformed account.fqn "bad::fqn"'
stdout 'warning: invariant: malformed tag.fqn "bad::tag"'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/inv_prefix_free_hierarchy.db
duckdbexec $WORK/inv_prefix_free_hierarchy.db inv_prefix_free_hierarchy.sql
! exec mina db validate --db $WORK/inv_prefix_free_hierarchy.db --schema demo
stderr 'error: invariant: account.fqn hierarchy conflict: "ValidateAccount:Leaf" prefixes "ValidateAccount:Leaf:Child"'
stderr 'error: invariant: category.fqn hierarchy conflict: "ValidateCategory:Leaf" prefixes "ValidateCategory:Leaf:Child"'
stderr 'error: invariant: tag.fqn hierarchy conflict: "ValidateTag:Leaf" prefixes "ValidateTag:Leaf:Child"'
stderr 'error: invariant: transaction_template.fqn hierarchy conflict: "ValidateTemplate:Leaf" prefixes "ValidateTemplate:Leaf:Child"'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/inv_prefix_free_hierarchy_tombstoned.db
duckdbexec $WORK/inv_prefix_free_hierarchy_tombstoned.db inv_prefix_free_hierarchy_tombstoned.sql
exec mina db validate --db $WORK/inv_prefix_free_hierarchy_tombstoned.db --schema demo
stdout 'ok: database is valid'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/inv_unpaired_external_id.db
duckdbexec $WORK/inv_unpaired_external_id.db inv_unpaired_external_id.sql
exec mina db validate --db $WORK/inv_unpaired_external_id.db --schema demo
stdout 'info: invariant: account external_id and external_system must be paired'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/inv_memo_whitespace.db
duckdbexec $WORK/inv_memo_whitespace.db inv_memo_whitespace.sql
exec mina db validate --db $WORK/inv_memo_whitespace.db --schema demo
stdout 'info: invariant: journal_record.memo has leading or trailing whitespace'
stdout 'info: invariant: transaction_template_record.memo has leading or trailing whitespace'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/inv_duplicate_active_category.db
duckdbexec $WORK/inv_duplicate_active_category.db inv_duplicate_active_category.sql
exec mina db validate --db $WORK/inv_duplicate_active_category.db --schema demo
stdout 'warning: schema: missing unique index category_active_fqn_unique'
stdout 'warning: invariant: duplicate active category.fqn'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/inv_duplicate_active_imported_metadata.db
duckdbexec $WORK/inv_duplicate_active_imported_metadata.db inv_duplicate_active_imported_metadata.sql
exec mina db validate --db $WORK/inv_duplicate_active_imported_metadata.db --schema demo
stdout 'warning: schema: missing unique index imported_record_metadata_active_record_unique'
stdout 'warning: invariant: duplicate active imported_record_metadata.record_id'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/inv_duplicate_active_record_link.db
duckdbexec $WORK/inv_duplicate_active_record_link.db inv_duplicate_active_record_link.sql
exec mina db validate --db $WORK/inv_duplicate_active_record_link.db --schema demo
stdout 'warning: schema: missing unique index record_link_active_pair_unique'
stdout 'warning: invariant: duplicate active record_link origin_record_id/settlement_record_id'

duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/inv_mismatched_active_category_index.db
duckdbexec $WORK/inv_mismatched_active_category_index.db inv_mismatched_active_category_index.sql
exec mina db validate --db $WORK/inv_mismatched_active_category_index.db --schema demo
stdout 'warning: schema: index category_active_fqn_unique definition mismatch'
stdout 'warning: invariant: duplicate active category.fqn'

# Classification layer case.
duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/class_expense_shape.db
duckdbexec $WORK/class_expense_shape.db class_expense_shape.sql
! exec mina db validate --db $WORK/class_expense_shape.db --schema demo
stderr 'error: classification: transaction .* violates EXPENSE semantic shape'

# Startup validation runs shallow by default and can be disabled.
duckdbclone $WORK/demo.db $WORK/startup_broken_schema.db
duckdbexec $WORK/startup_broken_schema.db startup_broken_schema.sql
! exec mina migrate --db $WORK/startup_broken_schema.db --schema demo --yes
stderr 'database validation failed'
stderr 'error: schema: missing column journal_record.memo'
! exec mina serve --db $WORK/startup_broken_schema.db --schema demo --yes --host 127.0.0.1 --port 0 --quiet
stderr 'database validation failed'
stderr 'error: schema: missing column journal_record.memo'

# One-shot local clients skip startup validation even when the selected database fails it.
env MINA_SCHEMA=demo
exec mina client --db $WORK/startup_broken_schema.db --yes tags list
stdout '"total_count":8'
env MINA_SCHEMA=

freeport
exec mina serve --config-file startup-validation-none.toml --db $WORK/startup_broken_schema.db --schema demo --yes --host 127.0.0.1 --port $PORT --quiet &server&
httpget http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/api/health
kill -INT server
wait server

env MINA_STARTUP_VALIDATION=full
! exec mina serve --db $WORK/ref_dangling_account.db --schema demo --yes --host 127.0.0.1 --port 0 --quiet
stderr 'database validation failed'
stderr 'error: referential: active journal_record.account_id references missing account'

env MINA_STARTUP_VALIDATION=none
freeport
exec mina serve --db $WORK/startup_broken_schema.db --schema demo --yes --host 127.0.0.1 --port $PORT --quiet &server&
httpget http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/api/health
kill -INT server
wait server

duckdbsnapshot $WORK/demo.db $WORK/demo.snapshot

-- startup-validation-none.toml --
startup_validation = "none"
